issues.description: First effect has wrong trigger. Should be a triggered effect during your turn when 2+ DON!! are returned, not 'Activated'. The text says '[Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When 2 or more DON!! cards on your field are returned to your DON!! deck'
First effect missing the actual trigger condition - it should trigger when 2+ DON!! are returned to the DON!! deck, not 'Always'
First effect missing 'oncePerTurn' restriction specified in '[Once Per Turn]'
First effect missing duration 'DuringYourTurn' since the text specifies '[Your Turn]'
Second effect missing condition check. Should only draw if your DON!! count is equal to or less than opponent's DON!! count, not 'Always'
